note: A NON-GATING observational experiment. It does NOT replace the frozen two-condition agent_ab_pilot in coverage-matrix.json, and it changes no frozen numeric gate. RTK is a lossy reducer; qodec/VG is a lossless notation layer. The first comparison MUST run with unmodified frozen VG.

RAW.description: Native tool output, unreduced, with the notation brief control.

QODEC.description: Frozen VG (fold-grep-guarded), lossless, with the notation brief.

RTK.description: RTK lossy reduction of the tool output, with the notation brief.

RTK+QODEC.description: RTK reduction followed by frozen VG over the reduced output.

transparency.note: Only lossless arms may enter the transparency leaderboard. RTK is excluded because it is lossy.

end_to_end_utility.note: Compression percentage alone is never a final verdict. Utility is judged on success and total cost, not on how much text was removed.

token_accounting.canonical_meter: the same real target tokenizer used everywhere in v2
token_accounting.rtk_chars_over_4: may be stored ONLY as an RTK-native diagnostic column, never used in a leaderboard

baseline_rule: The first RTK comparison runs with unmodified frozen VG as an observational baseline. Only after that baseline may a separate future scope propose VG-RTK-v1, which receives a new policy name and source SHA and does NOT inherit frozen VG results as its own evidence.
